Table.name: Company_Profile
Table.Purpose: Store firm details for white-labeling the UI and Reports.
Table.Fields: FirmName, Address, PrimaryPhone, Email, LogoPath, GST_RegNo

Table.name: Students
Table.Fields: StudentID, PhotoPath, FullName, DOB, ClassID, Religion, Caste, Address, FatherDetails, MotherDetails, EmergencyContact, DateOfAdmission

Table.name: Payments
Table.Fields: PaymentID, StudentID, InvoiceNumber, AmountPaid, PaymentDate, PaymentMode, BalanceRemaining

ImageHandling.Feature: Webcam capture and local File Upload.
ImageHandling.Storage: Save files to %AppData%/SchoolData/Photos and store paths in SQLite.

UI_PageRequirements.Page: Visual stats: Total Students, Collection Today, Pending Fees.
Form to edit Firm Name, Address, Phone, and Upload/Change Logo.
Add/Edit Classes, set Session Times, and define Fees per class.
Detailed form based on the attached image with Profile Photo integration.
Search student -> View Ledger -> Accept Part/Full Payment -> Generate Invoice.

OutputDeliverables.Item: React state logic for handling dynamic Invoice Numbering.
Electron 'main.js' configuration for local file system access (FS).
A PDF Generation strategy (using jsPDF or react-pdf) to overlay database data onto a digital replica of the paper admission form.
